top_signals.title: Treasuries Gain in Catch-Up Trade as Trump Sees Progress on Iran
top_signals.summary: Treasuries rose across the curve after a holiday, as optimism over a potential US-Iran deal pushed oil prices lower and eased inflation concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Strikes Boats, Missile Sites in Iran
top_signals.summary: U.S. forces on Monday conducted strikes in southern Iran against targets including boats attempting to lay mines and missile launch sites, in what it described as defensive actions.The strikes came as Iran's top negotiator and its foreign minister…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
